message:
fix(ci): remove dead asupersync/rich_rust setup, fix broken doc links

Two pre-existing CI failures, one root cause and one straggler:

1. **Workspace-pollution dead code** (root cause for Test, Coverage,
   Documentation, Build job failures) — every CI job checked out
   asupersync and rich_rust into deps/{asupersync,rich_rust}, then
   either symlinked them to ../{asupersync,rich_rust} or registered
   them as additional rust-cache workspaces.  Both crates have been on
   crates.io for the entire 0.2.x line and Cargo.lock resolves them
   cleanly from `registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index`,
   so the deps/ directories were never used by the actual build.

   The dead checkouts caused real failures: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
   runs `cargo metadata --all-features --format-version 1 --no-deps`
   on each registered workspace, and that command exits 101 inside
   `deps/rich_rust` with:

       error: current package believes it's in a workspace when it's not:
       current:   .../fastmcp_rust/deps/rich_rust/Cargo.toml
       workspace: .../fastmcp_rust/Cargo.toml

   Drop the deps/ checkouts, the symlink-setup steps (Unix `ln -sfn`
   and Windows `New-Item -ItemType Junction`), and the extra
   `workspaces:` entries from every job.  195 lines deleted across
   8 jobs (lint, test, check, coverage, security, build, docs, msrv).

2. **Broken intra-doc links in fastmcp-server** (caused the Documentation
   job to fail under `RUSTDOCFLAGS=-D warnings`).  Five doc comments
   referenced types by short name from inside modules where they were
   not imported:

   - oauth.rs L1198, L1268: `[TokenAuthProvider]` -> `[crate::auth::TokenAuthProvider]`
   - router.rs L226, L300, L413: `[DuplicateBehavior::Error]` -> `[crate::DuplicateBehavior::Error]`

   Both types exist (`auth::TokenAuthProvider` is re-exported from
   lib.rs:69; `DuplicateBehavior` is defined at lib.rs:245) — only the
   doc-link path was missing the `crate::` prefix.  Code references
   already use the qualified form.

Verified locally on Rust nightly 1.97.0:
- `cargo test --workspace --all-features` -> all suites pass, including
  the previously-failing fastmcp_console README doctest
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` -> clean
- `RUSTDOCFLAGS=-D warnings cargo doc --no-deps --all-features` -> clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,33 +26,11 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
-          path: deps/asupersync
-
-      - name: Checkout rich_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust
-          path: deps/rich_rust
-
-      - name: Setup sibling path dependencies
-        run: |
-          ln -sfn "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/deps/asupersync" ../asupersync
-          ln -sfn "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/deps/rich_rust" ../rich_rust
-
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
-        with:
-          workspaces: |
-            . -> target
-            deps/asupersync -> deps/asupersync/target
-            deps/rich_rust -> deps/rich_rust/target
 
       - name: Check formatting
         run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
@@ -71,45 +49,11 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
-      - name: Checkout asupersync
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/asupersync
-          path: deps/asupersync
-
-      - name: Checkout rich_rust
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
-        with:
-          repository: Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust
-          path: deps/rich_rust
-
-      - name: Setup sibling path dependencies (Unix)
-        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
-        run: |
-          ln -sfn "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/deps/asupersync" ../asupersync
-          ln -sfn "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/deps/rich_rust" ../rich_rust
-
-      - name: Setup sibling path dependencies (Windows)
-        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
-        shell: pwsh
-        run: |
-          $repo = (Get-Location).Path
-          if (!(Test-Path ..\\asupersync)) {
-            New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path ..\\asupersync -Target (Join-Path $repo "deps\\asupersync") | Out-Null
-          }
-          if (!(Test-Path ..\\rich_rust)) {
-            New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path ..\\rich_rust -Target (Join-Path $repo "deps\\rich_rust") | Out-Null
-          }
-
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           key: ${{ matrix.os }}
-          workspaces: |
-            . -> target
-            deps/asupersync -> deps/asupersync/target
-            deps/rich_rust -> deps/rich_rust/target
 
       - name: Run tests
         run: cargo test --workspace --all-targets --all-features --verbose

-
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
         with:
           key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
-          workspaces: |
-            . -> target
-            deps/asupersync -> deps/asupersync/target
-            deps/rich_rust -> deps/rich_rust/target
 
       - name: Build release binary
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
